fixes.bug: grep -cF || printf '0' double-output causing HEADER_COUNT='0\n0' arithmetic error
fixes.patch: v3 — replaced || printf '0' with || true; added HEADER_COUNT=${HEADER_COUNT:-0} fallback

fixes.bug: Duplicate Block B in HEADER_COUNT==0/INSERT_IF_MISSING=true path overwrites NEW_CONTENT with literal-\n string-concat
fixes.patch: v2 (prior session) — added _MG_PS_DEDUPE=true flag in Block A
fixes.patch_also: v5 — changed Block B inner if from dedupe=false guard to dedupe=true guard (true-branch noop), preventing elif/else from overwriting NEW_CONTENT

test_results.failing_note: Test 17 is pre-existing failure in pre-bash-write-guard.sh (PROTECTED_PREFIXES missing .claude/memory). Out of scope for this workstream (one bug, one fix on mg-memory-patch-section).
